testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should create the draw successfully on first call
testcase.classname: should create the draw successfully on first call

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should return 409 if draw already exists
testcase.classname: should return 409 if draw already exists

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should generate exactly 144 matches
testcase.classname: should generate exactly 144 matches

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should ensure each team plays exactly 8 matches
testcase.classname: should ensure each team plays exactly 8 matches

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should ensure each team has 4 home and 4 away matches
testcase.classname: should ensure each team has 4 home and 4 away matches

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should ensure no team plays the same opponent twice
testcase.classname: should ensure no team plays the same opponent twice

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should distribute matches across 8 match days
testcase.classname: should distribute matches across 8 match days

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should ensure each team plays once per match day
testcase.classname: should ensure each team plays once per match day

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should respect confederation constraints (no same country)
testcase.classname: should respect confederation constraints (no same country)

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API POST /draw should limit each team to max 2 opponents from same confederation
testcase.classname: should limit each team to max 2 opponents from same confederation

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return matches with pagination
testcase.classname: should return matches with pagination

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return matches with id field
testcase.classname: should return matches with id field

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should filter matches by teamId
testcase.classname: should filter matches by teamId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should filter matches by matchDay
testcase.classname: should filter matches by matchDay

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should filter matches by both teamId and matchDay
testcase.classname: should filter matches by both teamId and matchDay

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return empty array when no matches match filter
testcase.classname: should return empty array when no matches match filter

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should handle pagination correctly
testcase.classname: should handle pagination correctly

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should use default pagination when not provided
testcase.classname: should use default pagination when not provided

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return 400 for invalid page number
testcase.classname: should return 400 for invalid page number

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return 400 for negative page number
testcase.classname: should return 400 for negative page number

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return 400 for limit greater than 100
testcase.classname: should return 400 for limit greater than 100

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches should return 400 for negative limit
testcase.classname: should return 400 for negative limit

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches without draw should return empty array when no draw exists
testcase.classname: should return empty array when no draw exists

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Draw Algorithm Robustness should consistently generate valid draws on multiple attempts
testcase.classname: should consistently generate valid draws on multiple attempts

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Draw Algorithm Robustness should not have any duplicate matches
testcase.classname: should not have any duplicate matches

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Draw Algorithm Robustness should have valid match day distribution (18 matches per day)
testcase.classname: should have valid match day distribution (18 matches per day)

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should return 400 for invalid matchDay (0)
testcase.classname: should return 400 for invalid matchDay (0)

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should return 400 for invalid matchDay (9)
testcase.classname: should return 400 for invalid matchDay (9)

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should return 400 for invalid matchDay (-1)
testcase.classname: should return 400 for invalid matchDay (-1)

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should handle page beyond total pages gracefully
testcase.classname: should handle page beyond total pages gracefully

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should return 400 for limit of 0
testcase.classname: should return 400 for limit of 0

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API Validation Edge Cases should return appropriate response for non-existent teamId
testcase.classname: should return appropriate response for non-existent teamId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /draw should return 404 when no draw exists
testcase.classname: should return 404 when no draw exists

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /draw should return draw details after creation
testcase.classname: should return draw details after creation

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API DELETE /draw should delete the current draw successfully
testcase.classname: should delete the current draw successfully

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API DELETE /draw should return 404 when trying to delete non-existent draw
testcase.classname: should return 404 when trying to delete non-existent draw

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should filter matches by a matchDay range
testcase.classname: should filter matches by a matchDay range

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should return 400 when matchDayFrom is greater than matchDayTo
testcase.classname: should return 400 when matchDayFrom is greater than matchDayTo

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should filter matches by countryId
testcase.classname: should filter matches by countryId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should return 400 for invalid countryId
testcase.classname: should return 400 for invalid countryId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should sort matches by matchDay descending
testcase.classname: should sort matches by matchDay descending

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should sort matches by homeTeam name ascending
testcase.classname: should sort matches by homeTeam name ascending

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches extra filters and sorting should return 400 for an invalid sortBy value
testcase.classname: should return 400 for an invalid sortBy value

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches/:id should return the match details for an existing id
testcase.classname: should return the match details for an existing id

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches/:id should return 404 for a non-existent id
testcase.classname: should return 404 for a non-existent id

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches/:id should return 400 for a non-numeric id
testcase.classname: should return 400 for a non-numeric id

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /matches/:id should return 400 for a non-positive id
testcase.classname: should return 400 for a non-positive id

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams should return all teams ordered by name
testcase.classname: should return all teams ordered by name

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams should filter teams by countryId
testcase.classname: should filter teams by countryId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams should filter teams by partial name search
testcase.classname: should filter teams by partial name search

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams should return 400 for an invalid countryId
testcase.classname: should return 400 for an invalid countryId

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams/:id should return the team and its matches after a draw is created
testcase.classname: should return the team and its matches after a draw is created

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams/:id should return the team with an empty matches array when no draw exists
testcase.classname: should return the team with an empty matches array when no draw exists

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams/:id should return 404 when the team does not exist
testcase.classname: should return 404 when the team does not exist

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /teams/:id should return 400 for a non-numeric id
testcase.classname: should return 400 for a non-numeric id

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /draw/statistics should return 404 when no draw exists
testcase.classname: should return 404 when no draw exists

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /draw/statistics should return aggregated statistics for the current draw
testcase.classname: should return aggregated statistics for the current draw

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /health should return 200 with health status
testcase.classname: should return 200 with health status

testcase.name: Champions League Draw API GET /health should include service information
testcase.classname: should include service information
